name: Maverick Force 2 BeamWash
comment: Maverick Force 2 BeamWash incorporates the latest LED and optical technologies to project the narrowest beams and deliver the deepest aerial washes. Foreground and background colors combine for sizzling atmospheric effects instantly with its built-in virtual gobo wheel. Flawlessly even output, full pixel mapping, and smooth 16-bit fades make this fixture a force to be reckoned with, live or on camera. Take control with DMX, RDM, sACN, Art-Net, Kling-Net or W-DMX.
